entities.grandfather: an old man in denim overalls and a plaid shirt
entities.boy: a boy in a red hoodie with messy hair

scenes.title: The Workshop
scenes.background_prompt: A cozy wooden workshop with a large workbench cluttered with tools, a pegboard on the wall hung with hammers and wrenches, wood shavings on the floor, shelves of paint cans and jars, and a small window letting in warm afternoon light. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cozy wooden workshop bathed in warm afternoon light from a small window. A large workbench in the center is cluttered with tools — a hand plane, chisels, a mallet, and scattered wood shavings. An old man in denim overalls and a plaid shirt stands at the workbench, carefully sanding a small wooden birdhouse, his brow furrowed in concentration. A golden retriever lies at his feet, chin resting on its front paws, watching him work with calm brown eyes. On the corner of the workbench, a small red hoodie is draped over a stool, and a child-sized pair of safety goggles rests beside it — as if their owner has just stepped out. A pegboard on the wall behind holds hammers, wrenches, and screwdrivers. Shelves along the side wall hold paint cans, jars of nails, and small wooden projects in progress.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place grandfather at the workbench (center), standing and sanding a small wooden birdhouse. Place dog lying at grandfather's feet, chin on paws, watching. Leave the stool at the corner of the workbench empty with a red hoodie draped over it — the boy (ghost entity) would appear here, standing beside grandfather as usual and helping with the project.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, several light brown wooden planks lie stacked on a floor made of wide wooden boards, which are scattered with curly wood shavings and small blue paint splatters. To the right of the planks, a three-legged wooden stool holds a red hooded sweatshirt draped over its seat. Behind the stool, an open doorway on the left reveals a sunlit outdoor scene with a winding dirt path leading through green bushes and trees under a blue sky with fluffy white clouds, indicating a clear day. To the right of the doorway, a wooden wall features a square window with a four-pane frame, showing more of the green trees and sky. In the center of the room, a grandfather with a full white beard and mustache, wearing a green baseball cap, a red and black plaid shirt, and blue denim overalls over brown boots, stands facing right. He is leaning over a large wooden workbench, using his hands to assemble a small, light-colored wooden birdhouse. Lying on the floor to the right of the grandfather is a golden-furred dog, a retriever, looking up toward him with a calm expression. The heavy wooden workbench is cluttered with various items, including a metal hand plane, a hammer, a large silver wrench, several blocks of wood, and a glass jar. Underneath the workbench, several paint cans in colors like green, red, and blue are stored alongside rolls of grey material and a wooden drawer. To the right of the workbench, a grey bucket is filled with vertical wood scraps, and several more planks lean against the side of the bench. On the wall behind the grandfather, a wooden pegboard holds an organized array of tools, including two hammers, three silver wrenches, a trowel, a small saw, four screwdrivers with colorful handles, and two pairs of pliers. To the right of the pegboard, a tall wooden shelving unit is filled with numerous glass jars containing small hardware like screws and nails on the top two shelves, while the lower shelves hold various paint cans in shades of green, yellow, blue, and red, along with several small glass bottles. The overall setting is a rustic, well-lit woodworking shop during a bright, clear day.
